title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-25
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished watering the plants and updating the daily app metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics and health checks in the APPS and GREENHOUSE markdown files.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse statistics up to date with the latest health and usage data.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot checking on a digital greenhouse, holding a clipboard with charts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot checking on a digital greenhouse full of glowing code-plants. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. The robot holds a tiny clipboard with pixelated charts, chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Text in pixel font: 'METRICS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
